title: Vocabulary
description: SKOS ConceptScheme metadata for VocabularyConcept records.

notation.title: Notation
notation.description: Stable short code for this vocabulary, e.g. aat, titleType.

uri.title: Scheme URI
uri.description: Canonical URI of this SKOS ConceptScheme.

prefLabel.title: Preferred label
prefLabel.description: Preferred labels in different languages (skos:prefLabel). At most one label per language.

definition.title: Definition
definition.description: Definitions of the vocabulary in different languages (skos:definition).

homepage.title: Homepage
homepage.description: Public homepage of the vocabulary or source.

sourceSystem.title: Source system
sourceSystem.description: System from which this vocabulary is harvested or managed.

sourceName.title: Source name
sourceName.description: Human-readable name of the source vocabulary.

sourceVersion.title: Source version
sourceVersion.description: Version or release label of the source data.

curiePrefix.title: CURIE prefix
curiePrefix.description: Prefix used for concept notations in this vocabulary.

queryTerm.title: Query term
queryTerm.description: Subset or harvest query tag applied to concepts from this vocabulary.

_mainTitle.title: Main title
_mainTitle.description: Automatically generated main title based on labels and notation.
